description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is composed of a mix of solid and open sections, with large window openings and a prominent balcony or terrace area on the upper floor. The structure sits on a stepped, geometric base that mimics a stylized landscape or urban lot, with strong horizontal and diagonal patterns. The facade includes a combination of opaque and transparent elements, suggesting the use of glass and concrete or masonry. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back and partially cantilevered over the lower level. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a stepped geometric base, featuring minimalist lines and a mix of solid and open sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, large windows, balcony, and the stepped patterned base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall sections, flat roof, and the continuation of the geometric base pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, upper floor setback, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the solid wall, upper floor overhang, and the patterned base extending around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large window openings and some continuous glass sections
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, possibly recessed, with steps leading up from the patterned base and minimal decorative elements.
